name: F-1 /postmortem: appends dated entry to FAILURE-LOG.md (Huntley-style failure-domain log)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" "double-charge on retry" >/dev/null && grep -q "double-charge" FAILURE-LOG.md && grep -E "^### [0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}" FAILURE-LOG.md && echo ok >&2
